case_title: DE VINCENZI, JAMES D. VS NORCAL WASTE SYSTEMS, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DE VINCENZI, JAMES D. AS TO DEFENDANT NORCAL WASTE SYSTEMS, INC. SANGIACOMO, MICHAEL J.: PRESIDENT,CHIEF EXEC.OFFR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE VINCENZI, JAMES D. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NORCAL WASTE SYSTEMS, INC. SANGIACOMO, MICHAEL J.: PRESIDENT,CHIEF EXEC.OFFR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO NORCAL WASTE SYSTEM INC. RETURNED INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS.
